title: AIDOS Confluence Manifest
description: Configuration for publishing AIDOS artifacts to Confluence

target.description: Publish target — currently only 'confluence' is supported

confluenceBaseUrl.description: Confluence Cloud base URL, e.g. https://example.atlassian.net

spaceKey.description: Confluence space key where pages are published

rootPageId.description: ID of the parent page in Confluence — all artifacts become child pages under this

confluenceEmail.description: Name of the GitHub secret containing the Confluence user email

confluenceToken.description: Name of the GitHub secret containing the Confluence API token

artifacts.description: Map of artifact filenames (relative to .aidos/ folder) to their metadata

status.description: Current status — rendered as a Confluence Status lozenge
